description_short: Made with the finest virgin microfiber fill and the softest cotton modal fabric, this comforter provides luxurious comfort and warmth for winter nights.

cover_fabric.wash_instructions: Machine washable using cold water and mild detergents.

proprietary_tech.name: Quilted Box Design
proprietary_tech.description: Keeps filling evenly distributed, prevents clumping or shifting.

faq_specs.question: What is the difference between the summer and winter Luxe Comforter variants?
faq_specs.answer: The summer variant is lighter and designed for breathable comfort in warmer conditions while the winter variant has a higher GSM fill for added warmth.

notes_observed: Luxe line uses cotton modal cover vs peached microfiber on standard line. Same 300 GSM fill = lighter than standard Winter Reversible (400).
